## Description

<!-- A clear description of the bug. -->

## Type

- [ ] False positive (benign text incorrectly flagged)
- [ ] False negative (attack text not flagged)
- [ ] Scoring issue (detected but wrong risk level)
- [ ] Other

## Input Text

<!-- The exact text that produced unexpected results. -->

```
[paste text here]
```

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What should have happened? -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened? Include score, risk level, and matched patterns if available. -->
